value.found_quote: Project-scoped servers enable team collaboration by storing configurations in a `.mcp.json` file at your project's root directory. This file is designed to be checked into version control, ensuring all team members have access to the same MCP tools and services.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes project-scoped MCP servers stored in a `.mcp.json` file at the project root, designed to be checked into version control for team sharing — exactly the configuration-as-code claim described.
